zh.lifeSummary: 當Lora de Hastings於1269年出生在英國諾福爾可阿希爾時，她的父親Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings34歲，母親Joane de Cantilupe28歲。她於大約1292年與Sir Thomas le Latimer在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1339年7月2日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lora de Hastings于1269年出生在英国諾福爾可阿希爾时，她的父亲Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings34岁，母亲Joane de Cantilupe28岁。她于大约1292年与Sir Thomas le Latimer在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1339年7月2日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lora de Hastings was born in 1269, in Ashill, Norfolk, England, her father, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 34 and her mother, Joane de Cantilupe, was 28. She married Sir Thomas le Latimer about 1292, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 July 1339, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lora de Hastings est née en 1269, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joane de Cantilupe, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas le Latimer environ 1292, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 juillet 1339, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lora de Hastings 1269 in Ashill, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 34 und ihre Mutter Joane de Cantilupe 28. Sie hat um 1292 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England Sir Thomas le Latimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Juli 1339 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lora de Hastings è nata il nel 1269 nel Ashill, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joane de Cantilupe, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas le Latimer circa 1292, nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 luglio 1339, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora de Hastingsが1269年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュイルで生まれた時，父Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは34歳，母Joane de Cantilupeは28歳であった。約1292年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークでSir Thomas le Latimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1339年7月2日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lora de Hastings(이)가 1269년 영국 노르폴크 애시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Cantilupe(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1292년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 Sir Thomas le Latimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1339년 7월 2일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lora de Hastings nasceu em 1269, em Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Cantilupe, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas le Latimer aproximadamente 1292, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de julho de 1339, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lora de Hastings родилась в 1269 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joane de Cantilupe, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas le Latimer около 1292 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 июля 1339 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lora de Hastings nació en 1269, en Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joane de Cantilupe, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas le Latimer aproximadamente 1292, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de julio de 1339, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
